conflict: An older opponent needles Anika's age and bereavement while court noise triggers hospital associations.
consequence: Anika wins through attritional discipline but vomits courtside; Ravi publicly praises toughness, teaching her that visible suffering only matters if it produces results.
must_land_beats: Opponent tests Anika with long rallies and body language games.
A sound cue on court overlaps with a memory of ICU monitors.
Anika closes out the match despite dizziness.
Post-match praise centers endurance, not wellbeing.
objective: Win the borough ladder match to prove the regimen works.
